headline: Open Concept Remodeling Preparation Checklist — Mount Washington
articleBody:
Open Concept Remodeling Preparation Checklist for Mount Washington Clients

Before your Open Concept Remodeling appointment with Opus Builders, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Measurements
2. Budget
3. Design preferences
4. Permits needed
5. Material selections

Contact Opus Builders at (818) 939-8855 to get started.
